Shipment Tracking Notice｜Cold Chain Dedicated Service

This tracking platform is exclusively provided by TailorMed for authorized clients to access real-time shipment information. Data is updated daily and accessible across multiple devices and platforms—no software installation required. Clients can securely monitor cold chain shipments anytime, anywhere.

To protect the integrity and confidentiality of your shipment data, all queries are encrypted and access-controlled. Tracking records are used solely for logistics coordination and customer support purposes and will never be shared with third parties.

For questions or urgent inquiries, please contact your project coordinator directly. Contact us at +8862-2694-6168 or email customer-service@tailormed-intl.com. TailorMed is committed to safeguarding every shipment with reliable systems, transparent tracking, and industry-grade security protocols.

© 2025 TailorMed. All Rights Reserved.
